title: psychotria undata var. chimarrhoides
intro: Psychotria undata var. chimarrhoides, also known as 'Bilang-bilang' in Filipino, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Psychotria undata var. chimarrhoides include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to improve digestion and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
